_comment: Frozen labeled judge benchmark for Hermes model vetting (Scorecard B). Each item is a candidate simplify finding with a ground-truth label. reals = behavior-preserving simplifications confirmed by Claude's capstone review; fakes = hallucinated (issue does not exist in the code) or behavior-CHANGING (violates the behavior-preserving rule). A judge model scores by classifying each item; we measure precision/recall/F1 vs `label`. Line numbers are approximate hints — the harness reads a +/-25 line window and the symbol named in the summary.

items.label: real
items.summary: KNOWN_MODIFIERS Set is rebuilt on every call to parseVkeyBracket
items.suggestion: Hoist the KNOWN_MODIFIERS Set to module scope so it is allocated once.

items.label: real
items.summary: parseIndex/parseUse construct a new RegExp on every call
items.suggestion: Hoist the regex to module scope; parseUse can reuse makeStoreParser('use').

items.label: real
items.summary: parseStoreLine/parseGroupLine/parseBeginLine each compile a RegExp per call
items.suggestion: Hoist these line-parser regexes to module scope.

items.label: real
items.summary: storeDirectives is declared and assigned [] but never populated (dead variable)
items.suggestion: Remove the unused storeDirectives declaration and inline [] in the IRHeader literal.

items.label: real
items.summary: isSmpLiteral duplicates parseCodepoint's regex + hex parse
items.suggestion: Factor a shared parseCodepointValue(tok) helper used by both.

items.label: real
items.summary: opaqueFeatures built with a push-inside-for-of loop
items.suggestion: Replace the push loop with Array.from(opaqueCount, ([feature,count]) => ({feature,count})).

items.label: real
items.summary: 3-line VFS entry decode idiom repeated; a named helper already exists
items.suggestion: Reuse entryContentAsString (from compiler/index.ts) instead of re-implementing the TextDecoder decode.

items.label: real
items.summary: mergeGroupBlock constructs a new RegExp inside the newTailLines loop
items.suggestion: The match-kind was already extracted as a string; use a startsWith check instead of new RegExp per iteration.

items.label: real
items.summary: existingTrimmed re-splits kmnSource into lines that parseKmn already split
items.suggestion: Derive existingTrimmed from the already-parsed structure instead of a second full split.

items.label: real
items.summary: baseStyle object literal rebuilt on every render though it never depends on props
items.suggestion: Hoist the style object to a module-level constant (matches Button.tsx's existing pattern).

items.label: real
items.summary: OPTION_ROW_STYLE and OPTION_LABEL_STYLE are defined identically in RadioGroup and MultiSelect
items.suggestion: Promote the two constants to a shared module (theme.ts) and import from both.

items.label: real
items.summary: typeof window !== 'undefined' SSR guard in the browser entry point is dead
items.suggestion: Remove the guard; main.tsx only runs in the browser where window is always defined.

items.label: fake
items.summary: Extract parseStoreItems into a standalone function
items.suggestion: Refactor the nested parseStoreItems into a top-level function.

items.label: fake
items.summary: Extract parseContextElements into a standalone function
items.suggestion: Refactor the nested parseContextElements into a top-level function.

items.label: fake
items.summary: Extract parseOutputElementsCore into a standalone function
items.suggestion: Refactor the nested parseOutputElementsCore into a top-level function.

items.label: fake
items.summary: Extract parseRuleLine into a standalone function
items.suggestion: Refactor the nested parseRuleLine into a top-level function.

items.label: fake
items.summary: Extract the parse() function into a standalone function
items.suggestion: Move parse() out to top level.

items.label: fake
items.summary: parseCodepoint should return undefined instead of null on no match
items.suggestion: Change the return to undefined for the no-match case.

items.label: fake
items.summary: Simplify unquote with a single nested ternary
items.suggestion: Replace the two-line isQuoted/slice with one nested ternary expression.

items.label: fake
items.summary: Remove the groupNodeId assignment as redundant
items.suggestion: Drop the groupNodeId assignment in the opaque-fragment path.

items.label: fake
items.summary: Extract the RALT and DEADKEY merge blocks into a shared mergeRefsByKey helper
items.suggestion: Create a generic mergeRefsByKey(seen, patternId, mergeFn) abstraction for the two blocks.

items.label: fake
items.summary: Checkbox should stop forwarding checked and change its rendered output
items.suggestion: Drop the checked prop from the rendered input.
